---
name: Feature request
about: Something you'd want warble to do that it doesn't yet
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What's the problem, in your own workflow?**

Describe what you're trying to do and where warble falls short — concrete beats abstract ("I
dictate into X and Y happens" is more useful than "it should be smarter").

**What would you want instead?**

**Have you seen this done well elsewhere?** (Wispr Flow, superwhisper, VoiceInk, Handy, Apple's
own tools, anything) — naming it helps, and it's fine if the answer is "no, this is warble-only."

**Does it fit the constitution?** (skim [docs/product.md](../../docs/product.md) §4/§6 if unsure)
warble stays 100% on-device forever, no accounts, no telemetry, MIT-licensed, and nothing
re-enables itself once turned off. A request that needs a server or an account is a hard no by
design, not an oversight — say so if you're not sure and we'll sort it out in the issue.

**Anything else?**
